name: dotrush-cc
description: DotRush C# LSP for Claude Code, with a custom-notification injection proxy

plugins.name: dotrush
plugins.description: DevExpress DotRush Roslyn language server wired into Claude Code's LSP tool, plus a stdio proxy that can inject custom LSP messages (diagnostics, live reconfigure/reload) into the running server. Auto-downloads the DotRush server on first use.
